faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Storico.
faq.a1: Storico is an open-source tool that uses AI to automatically break down user stories into structured Kanban tasks. Just paste a user story and get technical tasks with descriptions, labels, and dependencies ready to export.
faq.q2: Do I need a credit card or API key to use it?
faq.a2: Not at all. Storico is free and open source. You can run it locally using Ollama with no API keys, no subscriptions, and no hidden costs.
faq.q3: What kind of user stories does it work with?
faq.a3: Storico works best with standard "As a... I want... so that..." format user stories in English. The more specific your story, the better the task breakdown.
faq.q4: Can I edit the generated tasks before exporting?
faq.a4: Absolutely. You can review, edit, or delete any task before exporting. You also have full control over the resulting Kanban board.
faq.q5: What formats can I export to?
faq.a5: You can export to Trello (directly to your boards), JSON, or Markdown. CSV and XML support are on the roadmap.
faq.q6: Can I use local AI models instead of cloud APIs?
faq.a6: Yes. Storico supports Ollama out of the box, so you can run entirely offline with local models like LLaMA 3.2 or Mistral. Cloud models (OpenAI, Anthropic) are also supported.

cta.title: Start transforming your user stories into tasks today
cta.subtitle: Free and open source. No complicated sign-up, no credit card.
